ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing mode (e.g., synchronous, asynchronous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing mode */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the processing mode was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the processing mode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message format */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the message format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message format */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message format was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "terminal_identifier" TEXT /* Identification string for the terminal */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device for the terminal */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the terminal was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the terminal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device capabilities */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processing mode */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the message format */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terminal */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES processing_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES message_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the field */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description or field value */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_fields_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the field type (e.g., string, integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field type */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field type was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Required, Optional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size constraint */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field to which the constraint applies */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size allowed for the field */,
  "min_size" INTEGER /* Minimum size required for the field */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size constraint was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size constraint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_constraints_field_name FOREIGN KEY ("field_name") REFERENCES configuration_fields ("field_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_logs" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status was logged */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status log was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration associated with the change */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field after the change */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field */,
  "dependent_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent field */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., one-to-one, one-to-many) */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was added */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_dependencies_dependent_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_field_id") REFERENCES configuration_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_dependencies_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES configuration_fields ("field_id")
)
